scope: Execute the post-backtest optimization plan through coordinated data, tactical, model, red-team and betting-risk threads.

data_collector.task: Audit prediction/result linkage, create model-ready backtest table, flag missing top5/prediction-chain fields and player-state update gaps.
expected_outputs: 汇总/预测回测数据质量审计_20260622.md

tactics.task: Convert observed error patterns into tactical volatility and draw-floor factors with direction, magnitude, evidence and confidence.
expected_outputs: 汇总/战术波动因子优化_20260622.md

modeler.task: Produce parameter update proposal: draw floor, event volatility, favorite ceiling tail, market calibration split and reporting contract.
expected_outputs: 汇总/模型参数优化方案_20260622.md

red_team.task: Review the optimization proposal for overfitting, small sample bias, double counting, market misuse and betting-language leakage.

betting_risk.task: Translate the optimization into stricter竞彩 risk gates; no purchase advice, only discussion_only/hold rules.
expected_outputs: 赔率与投注/模型优化后竞彩风险闸门_20260622.md

main_thread_outputs: 汇总/模型优化执行方案_20260622.md
required_changes_for_future_predictions: Use a formal top5 scoreline list for every match.
Separate highest single scoreline from aggregate 1X2 direction.
Apply a dynamic draw floor before final probability publication.
Apply event-volatility multipliers for red cards, early goals, goalkeeper overperformance, set-piece streaks and collapse risk.
Apply favorite-ceiling-tail expansion after strong favorite early-goal or discipline-disruption scenarios.
Split market calibration into direction signal and tail-risk signal.
Run red-team review before any final prediction or betting-risk file is published.
Backtest every completed prediction with WDL hit, top3 score hit, Brier/log-loss where probabilities are available, xG error and parameter update notes.

required: Markdown files have no skeleton/TODO/in_progress residue.
Red-team verdict is not hold for the model-optimization contract.
线程状态.md is appended at the end with final optimization status.
completion_gate.betting_boundary: No executable betting recommendation is allowed. Keep竞彩 outputs at discussion_only or hold unless official lineups, latest injuries, official竞彩 odds and same-source market snapshots are captured.
